statement: In every magma, Equation 980 (`x = y * ((z * z) * (x * w))`) implies Equation 4050 (`x * y = (z * (w * z)) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0748
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op z z) (op x w)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op z (op w z)) y)
